reviews.comment:
Es el unico lugar entre san juan y san luis por lo que no hay mucho mas que decir. No es lo mejor, pero es muy importante.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only place between San Juan and San Luis, so there's not much more to say. It's not the best, but it's very important.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX3ZhU0xBEAE

reviews.comment:
Debería ser una estación más moderna, teniendo en cuenta que es una ruta por donde ingresa mucho turismo.
Media pila gente, armar algo mejor como un shop no estaría mal.

(Translated by Google)
It should be a more modern station, considering it's a route with a lot of tourism. Come on, people, adding something better, like a shop, wouldn't be a bad idea.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOXZMT3BBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es linda pero siempre que voy está cerrado. Los dueños cierran muy temprano ante de las 21hs

(Translated by Google)
It's nice, but every time I go, it's closed. The owners close very early, before 9 p.m.
